title: Outdoor World Folding Sit Mat – Lightweight Waterproof Foam Seat Pad for Camping, Hiking, Festivals & Picnics – Compact Foldable Cushion for Outdoor, Stadiums & Garden Use
features: PREMIUM QUALITY WITH COMFORT – This insulated foam sit pad provides ideal protection from cold and moisture, giving thermal insulation to keep you warm while sitting on cold surfaces. Made from hard-wearing 600D polyester material with waterproof PU backing for maximum durability.

MULTI-PURPOSE USE ANYWHERE – Perfect for parks, beaches, hillsides, stadiums, and all outdoor activities such as hiking, walking, camping, picnics, festivals, and fishing. Can also be used as a knee pad for gardening or work tasks.
COMFORTABLE SIZE – Folding sit mat with thick padded foam, comfortable for adults and children alike. Fully opened size: 53 x 38 x 1 cm.
FOLDABLE DESIGN – Easy to pack and fold with quadruple folds and Velcro straps for compact storage in any bag or backpack. Folded size per compact mat: 38.5 x 13.5 x 6 cm.
COMPACT, LIGHTWEIGHT AND EASY TO CARRY – Our X-Large portable seat is still very light weighing only 200 grams.
description: Product Description Premium Quality Stay comfortable and protected while camping, fishing, or tailgating with this durable outdoor mat. It is made from 600D polyester material with a waterproof PU backing to keep you dry always. Thick Padded Foam With thick padded foam and a non-slip surface that's comfortable for both adults and children, you'll be able to lounge around the campfire without getting your clothes all dirty. Waterproof & Tear-Resistant The waterproof and tear-resistant fabric ensures that your mat will stay in good condition for years to come. It allows you to sit back, take a break and enjoy your surroundings.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Outdoor Seating, Camping, Hiking, Picnics, Outdoor Activities
